# Scenario Simulation Results

**Key:** carryScore = (weak partner change) - (strong partner change). Positive means the weak partner got more than the strong partner. Negative means the strong partner got more.

## balanced vs balanced, close win

- Team: 1500/1500 (avg 1500) — balanced, weak=same, strong=same
- Opponents: 1500/1500 (avg 1500) — balanced
- Score: 11-9 (team wins)

| Engine | same change | same change | carryScore |
|--------|------------|-------------|------------|
| CURRENT underdog-credit | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Equal split | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap-adjusted 0.5 | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap-adjusted 0.75 | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap-adjusted 1.0 | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap-adjusted 2.0 | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap-adjusted 0.5 win-only | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap-adjusted 0.75 win-only | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap-adjusted 1.0 win-only | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 0.75 win + ratingProp loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 1.0 win + ratingProp loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 1.5 win + ratingProp loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 0.75 win + equalSplit loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 1.0 win + equalSplit loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 1.5 win + equalSplit loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 0.75 win + softUnderdog loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 1.0 win + softUnderdog loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Gap 1.5 win + softUnderdog loss | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Rating-proportional | +13 | +14 | -1 |
| Field-relative proportional | +13 | +14 | -1 |
